hooks.prompt: Review the task you just completed. The self-improving skill is available under .claude/skills/self-improving/ if you need guidance. If the task involved non-trivial problem solving, trial and error, a reusable workflow, or a new pattern, save it as a skill under this project's .claude/skills/ (or ~/.claude/skills/ if broadly applicable). If nothing stands out, say 'Nothing to save.' and stop.
